description: SVG banner and icon generation API for the style.md industrial monospace design system.

authentication.method: API key via header or query parameter
authentication.note: Add this secret to your GitHub repo or org settings. The value is provided by the style.md service admin.

params.label: Text label for text mode (e.g. 'St')
params.icon: Remix icon name for icon mode (use ?type=icons to list)

icons.description: List all available remix icon names

implementation.description: Add a GitHub Actions workflow that generates a banner SVG on every merge to main and commits it to the repo.

secrets.STYLEMD_API_KEY: Set this as a GitHub Actions secret (repo or org level). The value is your API key for this service.
secrets.STYLEMD_GENERATE_URL: Set this as a GitHub Actions secret or variable containing the full function URL (e.g. https://faas-lon1-917a94a7.doserverless.co/api/v1/web/fn-.../generate/svg).

workflow.note: This workflow runs on pushes to main but skips runs triggered by its own commits (via [skip ci] in the commit message) to prevent infinite loops.
workflow.content:
name: Generate Banner

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths-ignore:
      - '.github/banner.svg'

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  generate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: "!contains(github.event.head_commit.message, '[skip ci]')"
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Extract version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'v0.0.0')
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate banner
        env:
          GENERATE_URL: ${{ secrets.STYLEMD_GENERATE_URL }}
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.STYLEMD_API_KEY }}
          REPO_NAME: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          REPO_DESC: ${{ github.event.repository.description }}
          VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p .github
          curl -sfG "$GENERATE_URL" \
            --data-urlencode "api_key=$API_KEY" \
            --data-urlencode "name=$REPO_NAME" \
            --data-urlencode "tagline=$REPO_DESC" \
            --data-urlencode "version=$VERSION" \
            -o .github/banner.svg

      - name: Commit banner
        run: |
          git config user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
          git config user.email '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
          git add .github/banner.svg
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo 'No changes to commit'
          else
            git commit -m 'Update banner [skip ci]'
            git push
          fi
